title: Ücret Analitiği
description: Sabit ücret, değişken ücret ve ücret hareketleri — departman, kıdem, eğitim, seviye bazlı dağılım ve trend.

aggregate.join: CROSS JOIN (SELECT TOP 1 PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY SALARY) OVER() AS median_val FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND SALARY > 0) med_sub

aggregate.where: ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND SALARY > 0
ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND SALARY > 0

aggregate.join: CROSS JOIN (SELECT AVG(CASE WHEN prev.SALARY > 0 THEN (cur.SALARY - prev.SALARY) / prev.SALARY ELSE NULL END) AS avg_increase FROM (SELECT EMPLOYEE_ID, SALARY FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND SALARY > 0) cur INNER JOIN (SELECT EMPLOYEE_ID, SALARY FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) - 1 AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND SALARY > 0) prev ON cur.EMPLOYEE_ID = prev.EMPLOYEE_ID) yoy_sub

CROSS JOIN (SELECT AVG(epr.SALARY) AS avg_sal FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT] eio ON eio.EMPLOYEE_ID = epr.EMPLOYEE_ID WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND epr.SALARY > 0 AND eio.START_DATE >= DATEADD(YEAR, -1, GETDATE())) nh_sub

CROSS JOIN (SELECT AVG(epr.SALARY) AS avg_sal FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT] eio ON eio.EMPLOYEE_ID = epr.EMPLOYEE_ID WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND epr.SALARY > 0 AND eio.START_DATE < DATEADD(YEAR, -1, GETDATE())) ex_sub

CROSS JOIN (SELECT (AVG(CASE WHEN eio.START_DATE >= DATEADD(YEAR, -1, GETDATE()) THEN epr.SALARY END) - AVG(CASE WHEN eio.START_DATE < DATEADD(YEAR, -1, GETDATE()) THEN epr.SALARY END)) / NULLIF(AVG(CASE WHEN eio.START_DATE < DATEADD(YEAR, -1, GETDATE()) THEN epr.SALARY END), 0) AS gap_pct FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT] eio ON eio.EMPLOYEE_ID = epr.EMPLOYEE_ID AND eio.FINISH_DATE IS NULL WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND epr.SALARY > 0) gap_sub

aggregate.where: ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND SALARY > 0

aggregate.select: CASE WHEN SALARY < 20000 THEN '0-20K' WHEN SALARY < 40000 THEN '20-40K' WHEN SALARY < 60000 THEN '40-60K' WHEN SALARY < 80000 THEN '60-80K' WHEN SALARY < 100000 THEN '80-100K' WHEN SALARY < 150000 THEN '100-150K' ELSE '150K+' END AS label, COUNT(*) AS value
aggregate.where: ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND SALARY > 0
aggregate.groupBy: CASE WHEN SALARY < 20000 THEN '0-20K' WHEN SALARY < 40000 THEN '20-40K' WHEN SALARY < 60000 THEN '40-60K' WHEN SALARY < 80000 THEN '60-80K' WHEN SALARY < 100000 THEN '80-100K' WHEN SALARY < 150000 THEN '100-150K' ELSE '150K+' END

aggregate.where: ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND SALARY > 0

aggregate.select: CASE epos.COLLAR_TYPE WHEN 1 THEN 'Beyaz Yaka' WHEN 2 THEN 'Mavi Yaka' ELSE 'Belirtilmemiş' END AS label, AVG(SALARY) AS value, COUNT(*) AS value2
aggregate.where: ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND SALARY > 0
aggregate.join: INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].PUANTAJ_ID LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEE_POSITIONS] epos ON epos.EMPLOYEE_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].EMPLOYEE_ID AND epos.POSITION_STATUS = 1

aggregate.select: CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, eio.START_DATE, GETDATE()) < 1 THEN '0-1 yıl' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, eio.START_DATE, GETDATE()) < 3 THEN '1-3 yıl' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, eio.START_DATE, GETDATE()) < 5 THEN '3-5 yıl' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, eio.START_DATE, GETDATE()) < 10 THEN '5-10 yıl' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, eio.START_DATE, GETDATE()) < 15 THEN '10-15 yıl' ELSE '15+ yıl' END AS label, AVG([workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].SALARY) AS value
aggregate.where: ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].SALARY > 0 AND eio.FINISH_DATE IS NULL
aggregate.join: INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].PUANTAJ_ID INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT] eio ON eio.EMPLOYEE_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].EMPLOYEE_ID AND eio.FINISH_DATE IS NULL
aggregate.groupBy: CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, eio.START_DATE, GETDATE()) < 1 THEN '0-1 yıl' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, eio.START_DATE, GETDATE()) < 3 THEN '1-3 yıl' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, eio.START_DATE, GETDATE()) < 5 THEN '3-5 yıl' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, eio.START_DATE, GETDATE()) < 10 THEN '5-10 yıl' WHEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, eio.START_DATE, GETDATE()) < 15 THEN '10-15 yıl' ELSE '15+ yıl' END

aggregate.select: CASE ed.LAST_SCHOOL WHEN 1 THEN 'İlkokul' WHEN 8 THEN 'Ortaokul' WHEN 2 THEN 'Lise' WHEN 9 THEN 'Meslek Lisesi' WHEN 3 THEN 'Önlisans' WHEN 4 THEN 'Lisans' WHEN 10 THEN 'Mühendislik' WHEN 11 THEN 'Fakülte' WHEN 5 THEN 'Yüksek Lisans' WHEN 6 THEN 'Doktora' ELSE 'Belirtilmemiş' END AS label, AVG(SALARY) AS value
aggregate.where: ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND SALARY > 0
aggregate.join: INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].PUANTAJ_ID INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES] e ON e.EMPLOYEE_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].EMPLOYEE_ID LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_DETAIL] ed ON ed.EMPLOYEE_ID = e.EMPLOYEE_ID

aggregate.select: ISNULL(NULLIF(RTRIM(ROW_DEPARTMENT_HEAD),''), 'Belirtilmemiş') AS label, AVG(CASE WHEN ed.SEX = 1 THEN SALARY END) AS value, AVG(CASE WHEN ed.SEX = 0 THEN SALARY END) AS value2
aggregate.where: ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND SALARY > 0
aggregate.join: INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].PUANTAJ_ID INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES] e ON e.EMPLOYEE_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].EMPLOYEE_ID LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_DETAIL] ed ON ed.EMPLOYEE_ID = e.EMPLOYEE_ID

aggregate.select: CAST(ep.SAL_YEAR AS VARCHAR) + '-' + RIGHT('0' + CAST(ep.SAL_MON AS VARCHAR), 2) AS label, AVG(SALARY) AS value, COUNT(EMPLOYEE_ID) AS value2
aggregate.where: (ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) OR (ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE())-1 AND ep.SAL_MON >= MONTH(GETDATE()))) AND ep.SAL_MON <= CASE WHEN ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) THEN MONTH(GETDATE())-1 ELSE 12 END AND SALARY > 0
aggregate.groupBy: CAST(ep.SAL_YEAR AS VARCHAR) + '-' + RIGHT('0' + CAST(ep.SAL_MON AS VARCHAR), 2)

aggregate.join: CROSS JOIN (SELECT CASE WHEN pct < 0 THEN 'Düşüş' WHEN pct < 0.10 THEN '%0-10' WHEN pct < 0.20 THEN '%10-20' WHEN pct < 0.30 THEN '%20-30' WHEN pct < 0.50 THEN '%30-50' ELSE '%50+' END AS label, COUNT(*) AS value, MIN(CASE WHEN pct < 0 THEN 0 WHEN pct < 0.10 THEN 1 WHEN pct < 0.20 THEN 2 WHEN pct < 0.30 THEN 3 WHEN pct < 0.50 THEN 4 ELSE 5 END) AS sort_order FROM (SELECT cur.EMPLOYEE_ID, (cur.SALARY - prev.SALARY) / NULLIF(prev.SALARY, 0) AS pct FROM (SELECT EMPLOYEE_ID, SALARY FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND SALARY > 0) cur INNER JOIN (SELECT EMPLOYEE_ID, SALARY FROM [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS] epr INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = epr.PUANTAJ_ID WHERE ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) - 1 AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND SALARY > 0) prev ON cur.EMPLOYEE_ID = prev.EMPLOYEE_ID) x GROUP BY CASE WHEN pct < 0 THEN 'Düşüş' WHEN pct < 0.10 THEN '%0-10' WHEN pct < 0.20 THEN '%10-20' WHEN pct < 0.30 THEN '%20-30' WHEN pct < 0.50 THEN '%30-50' ELSE '%50+' END) inc_sub

aggregate.select: ISNULL(NULLIF(RTRIM(ROW_DEPARTMENT_HEAD),''), 'Belirtilmemiş') AS label, AVG(CASE WHEN eio.START_DATE >= DATEADD(YEAR, -1, GETDATE()) THEN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].SALARY END) AS value, AVG(CASE WHEN eio.START_DATE < DATEADD(YEAR, -1, GETDATE()) THEN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].SALARY END) AS value2
aggregate.where: ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].SALARY > 0 AND eio.FINISH_DATE IS NULL
aggregate.join: INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ] ep ON ep.PUANTAJ_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].PUANTAJ_ID INNER JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_IN_OUT] eio ON eio.EMPLOYEE_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].EMPLOYEE_ID AND eio.FINISH_DATE IS NULL

aggregate.select: ISNULL(NULLIF(RTRIM(ep.COMP_NICK_NAME),''), 'Belirtilmemiş') AS label, AVG(SALARY) AS value, COUNT(DISTINCT EMPLOYEE_ID) AS value2
aggregate.where: ep.SAL_YEAR = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND ep.SAL_MON = MONTH(GETDATE()) - 1 AND SALARY > 0

collarType.join: LEFT JOIN [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEE_POSITIONS] epos ON epos.EMPLOYEE_ID = [workcube_mikrolink].[EMPLOYEES_PUANTAJ_ROWS].EMPLOYEE_ID AND epos.POSITION_STATUS = 1
